name: recall-quality
description: Small deterministic recall fixture for Meminisse scoring.

memories.text: Meminisse 0.3.0 uses meminisse install --local --force as the only supported local Codex install command.

Meminisse release workflow is git status, stage release files, git add -u deleted files, commit Release X.Y.Z, tag vX.Y.Z, npm publish, push main and tag, install globally, run meminisse install --local --force, then run meminisse doctor.
Meminisse attach copies support files into .meminisse/attachments/YYYY/MM/slug with original file, metadata.json, note.md, and a memory record containing those paths.

Meminisse doctor checks CLI version, package version, bundled plugin manifest, installed plugin, installed skill, marketplace entry, project memory, global memory parent, and .meminisse gitignore coverage.
Meminisse review reports stale version memories, duplicate active records, and broken project-local path references without changing stored records.
